me.name: Cas
me.notes: Got mized out of nowhere😭 Failed talking stage👎

friend.name: Thato
friend.notes: The only guy who looks decent within my roster so far, lazy ass man who just wants to clap cheeks. Looks like a stud and is constantly mistaken for being gay, yikes… believes he’s the hottest man to ever exist. He’s mad funny though, he’s got that kasi humour icl

friend.name: Thabang (bunny)
friend.notes: Loves whole heartedly and still flirts w me from time to time (I lwk miss this nga) he has uneven legs so he walks funny. However no other nga has loved me as hard as he has lol. Also his little sister is proper INLOVE w him

friend.name: Tinashe
friend.notes: This nga wanted us to be girlfriend and boyfriend within the first few hours of us talking cause he said he doesn’t do talking stages and I agreed to it because that’s the worst that could happen

friend.name: Keabetswe
friend.notes: Ghosted me a few months ago and I gave him a second chance and he ghosted me again. Oh nah he got it frfr. Loki gave me hope that we could become something great I’m fairly disappointed
